meaning: v.搴熸,鎾ら攢,鍚﹀畾,鏀惧純,搴熼櫎n.搴熼櫎,鎾ら攢
examples: The Republicans are promising to "repeal and replace" the bill.
Changing habits eroded the rules and led to their formal repeal.
He promised anew to repeal DOMA and "don't ask, don't tell".
Now that they have a majority, House Republicans have promised to make repeal a priority.
With ObamaCare more unpopular than ever, House Republicans voted last month to repeal it.
